# <Domain> — Gates

Run at the Plan stage (1) and again at Review depth (4). Answer each gate explicitly; a single
failure is a finding that blocks sign-off until resolved. Where a gate can be partly enforced by a
deterministic check, name it (so the check and the human judgment reinforce each other).

### Gate 1 — <name>

<The question this gate forces an explicit answer to.>

> **FAIL format:** <how a reviewer states a failure of this gate>
> <If a check enforces part of this, name it, e.g. "Partly enforced by required-sections.mjs.">
